prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/322-sheet.numbers in Numbers. Freeze the first (header) row so it stays visible while scrolling. (Format sidebar > Table > Headers & Footer > set Header Rows to 1 if needed, then choose Freeze Header Rows; or Table menu > Freeze Header Rows.) Save. When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/322-freeze-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
